questionHtml: Show that the average rate at which thermal energy is transferred into the chocolate is about 15 W.
markschemeHtml:
Reads change in temperature to be 45 − 31 OR 14 °C ✓


Q = 0.082 × 1.6 × 103 × 14 = 1.84 × 103 «J» ✓

P = 1.84×1032.0×60 = 15.3 ≈ 15 «W»✓

 

Must see either full substitution OR answer to at least 3 s.f. in MP3

meta.title: Show that the average rate at which thermal energy is transferred into the chocolate is about 15 W.
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
